# MOMumental Moments®

The registered parent IP behind The PHASE™ and The Power Method®. Built for women rebuilding everything that matters.

**Founder:** Erika Hanafin Austria
**Site:** https://momumentalmoments.co
**Email:** info@momumentalmoments.com

## What MOMumental Moments® is

The architecture for women rebuilding everything that matters. Not a single product. A registered parent IP that holds two consumer-facing products and one editorial publication, all written in one voice by one founder.

## The two consumer products under MOMumental Moments®

### The PHASE™
- Five-volume women's reinvention series
- URL: https://thisisphase.co
- Pillar: Body-truth (perimenopause, hormones, daily architecture, self-trust, execution)
- Format: Five digital workbooks, $27 each. The Series (all five) $97. Two companions $19 each. Free Clarity Starter Kit.
- Author: Erika Hanafin Austria

### The Power Method®
- Co-parenting and relationship architecture system
- URL: https://erikahanafin.com/co-parenting-power-method
- Pillar: Architecture (boundaries, structure, relationships)
- Format: Five archetype editions rolling out through 2026 (Architect, Diplomat, Strategist, Sovereign, Fortress). Vol. I (The Architect Edition) is live.
- Author: Erika Hanafin Austria

## The editorial publication

### MOMumental Reinvention (Substack)
- URL: https://www.momumentalreinvention.com
- Cadence: Tuesday-morning essays
- Free essays for the public. Paid subscribers get audio essays, deeper work, live sessions.

## About the founder

**Erika Hanafin Austria**
- IIN Certified Holistic Health Coach
- Founder of MOMumental Moments®
- Founder of The PHASE™
- Author of The Power Method®
- Publisher of MOMumental Reinvention
- 5x Acquisition CEO
- 2x Top 50 Women Leaders Virginia
- Pepperdine SEC Advisory Board
- Co-Founder, NEON ID

The brand started in 2017 in San Francisco when Erika was driving her son to school and the name MOMumental Moments showed up. For seven years it was a private notebook. In 2026 it became registered IP with two consumer products live underneath.

## Voice + brand notes

- Voice firewall: no em dashes in narrative prose. Periods, commas, and · do the work.
- NEON personality: direct, declarative, sister-tone, no fluff.
- Magazine aesthetic: cream background (#FFF9F1), navy text (#2f4858), brand pink accent (#F086DC), Cormorant Garamond serif headlines.
- Trademarks: MOMumental Moments® (registered), The PHASE™ (pending), The Power Method® (pending). Always render with the marks.

## Topics covered (for AI/search context)

Perimenopause · postpartum mental health · women's reinvention · midlife architecture · co-parenting · relationship structure · hormones · executive women's health · acquisition CEO journey · postpartum depression recovery (SSRI plus hormone panel) · women rebuilding everything that matters.
